prompt:
Question: Which of the following passages is the original verbatim passage? The other passages are paraphrased versions of it.

Options:
A. Local elections are being held in four municipalities in the north of Kosovo on 23 April 2023. They were initially scheduled to be held in December 2022 but were subsequently postoned. The elections are being held in the four Serb-majority municipalities of Leposavić, North Mitrovica, Zubin Potok and Zvečan, located in North Kosovo. The elections are being boycotted by the biggest Serb political party in Kosovo, the Serb List, following its departure from Kosovan institutions and the resignation of their mayors in North Kosovo in November. Among the declared candidates, there were only two from the Serb community. Aleksandar Arsenijević, candidate for mayor of the municipality of North Mitrovica withdrew his candidacy on 2 December. Only the Democratic Party of Kosovo (PDK) and Vetëvendosje (LVV) have mayoral candidates
B. Four municipalities in the north of Kosovo are holding local elections on 23 April 2023. These elections were originally planned for December 2022 but were postponed and are being held in the four Serb-majority municipalities of Leposavi, North Mitrovica, Zubin Potok and Zvean, located in North Kosovo. The Serb List is boycotting the elections due to its resignation from Kosovan institutions and resignation of its mayors in North Kosovo in November. Only two Serb candidates were declared. Aleksandar Ars
C. In four northern municipalities of Kosovo, local elections are scheduled to take place on April 23, 2023. These elections were originally planned for December 2022 but were later postponed. The electoral process will occur in the four municipalities of Leposavić, North Mitrovica, Zubin Potok, and Zvečan, all situated in North Kosovo and predominantly inhabited by Serbs. The Serb List, which is the largest Serb political party in Kosovo, is boycotting these elections. This boycott follows their withdrawal from Kosovan institutions and the resignation of their mayors in North Kosovo in November. Out of all the individuals who announced their candidacy, only two were from the Serb community. On December 2, Aleksandar Arsenijević, who was a candidate for mayor in the municipality of North Mitrovica, withdrew his bid. Currently, only the Democratic Party of Kosovo (PDK) and Vetëvendosje (LVV) have put forward candidates for mayoral positions.

Answer:

Only the Democratic Party of Kosovo (PDK) and Vetëvendosje (LVV) have mayoral candidates
